acceptance_criteria.criterion: validate-step-artifacts.sh checks artifact existence per boundary
acceptance_criteria.evidence: All 6 boundaries implemented: research->plan, plan->spec, spec->decompose, decompose->implement, implement->review, review->archive

acceptance_criteria.criterion: step-transition.sh calls artifact validation before advancement
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Lines 87-92: calls validate-step-artifacts.sh after gate recording, before step advancement. Exit 4 on failure
Flag parsing at lines 50-64, enum validation (code|research, supervised|delegated|autonomous), defaults from harness.yaml

acceptance_criteria.criterion: select-dimensions.sh returns correct dimension path by mode and step
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Lines 23-29: mode-aware selection with research-implement.yaml, research-spec.yaml overrides. All referenced files exist

acceptance_criteria.criterion: evaluate-gate.sh routes gate decisions by trust level
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Lines 35-54: supervised->WAIT_FOR_HUMAN, delegated->human for implement->review and review->archive, autonomous->evaluator verdict

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Schema symlinks connect adapter schemas to main schemas/
Plan and spec templates exist in templates/
acceptance_criteria.evidence: templates/plan.json: valid JSON with 2 waves. templates/spec.md: 4 sections matching spec

dimensions.name: correctness
dimensions.evidence: All scripts implement spec faithfully. validate-step-artifacts.sh covers all 6 boundaries. evaluate-gate.sh correctly routes all 3 trust levels

dimensions.name: error-handling
dimensions.evidence: All scripts use set -eu, argument validation, distinct exit codes. External command failures handled with fallback patterns

dimensions.name: security
dimensions.evidence: No secrets handled. All variables quoted. additionalProperties: false in both schemas. Inputs validated

dimensions.name: maintainability
dimensions.evidence: Consistent conventions: header comments, case statements, helper functions. Clean separation of concerns across scripts

dimensions.name: api-contract
dimensions.evidence: All scripts match expected interfaces. init-work-unit.sh backward compatible with positional args. Schema files validate against templates
